title: Worker HTTP endpoint responds successfully
description: Checks that an HTTP endpoint on the selected worker responds with a 2xx or 3xx status.
command: code=$(curl -o /dev/null -s -w "%{http_code}" --max-time {{timeoutSeconds}} "{{url}}" || true); case "$code" in 2*|3*) exit 0 ;; *) echo "$code"; exit 1 ;; esac
